title: Asthma overview
body: Asthma is a chronic inflammatory airway disorder with variable, often reversible airflow obstruction.

prompt: Which pattern best matches asthma on pulmonary function testing?
explanation: Asthma is an obstructive disease, so FEV1 and FEV1/FVC are reduced.

title: Asthma review handout
body: Foundational review PDF for asthma learners.
